name: I have no doctor note or witnesses for paint fumes making me sick at work.

acceptedAnswer.text: Possible—use history, SDS, get diagnosis now[3].
acceptedAnswer.description: Claims possible with later medical diagnosis, exposure history, and SDS sheets—build case retrospectively. OSHA air policy aids[3]. - Self-report symptoms timeline. Start with doctor visit now. Seek coworkers later, file anyway for investigation.
